mapper.select: select open_kfid, next_cursor, update_time from kf_sync_cursor where open_kfid = #{openKfid}
mapper.insert: insert into kf_sync_cursor (open_kfid, next_cursor, update_time) values (#{openKfid}, #{nextCursor}, now()) on duplicate key update next_cursor = #{nextCursor}, update_time = now()
